title: FanSafe Phrase
description: Schema for a single entry in the phrasebook. Mirrors the shape currently hardcoded in FanSafe_PWA/index.html's `const phraseBook = [...]` array (index.html around line 1086). Reference schema only — not yet consumed at runtime, see docs/architecture.md Phase 2.

category.description: Must match one of the category ids in FanSafe_PWA/index.html's `const categories = [...]`.

values.description: Per-language phrase text. docs/content-governance.md requires every phrase to exist in ALL four languages before merge — a partial phrase is worse than no phrase, since the UI has no per-language fallback.

reviewStatus.description: Required, added 2026-07-19 (public-release gate-0 session). Do not claim 'native-speaker-reviewed' or 'professionally-translated' without an entry in reviewedBy providing evidence — see docs/content-governance.md. All phrases carried over from the original hardcoded phraseBook default to 'unreviewed' because no translator/authorship record exists for them.

reviewedBy.description: Per docs/content-governance.md: a fluent/native speaker reviewer per language, for emergency/medical category phrases especially. Required when reviewStatus is 'native-speaker-reviewed' or 'professionally-translated' (enforced by tools/validate-phrases.js, not expressible in this draft-07 schema subset without if/then support).
